design_philosophy: Refined restraint plus expressive detail. Atmospheric layouts, premium typography, tactile luxury cues (mocha/gold), and high-polish motion over generic SaaS blocks. Editorial, immersive, restrained, and expensive-looking.

surfaces.card: bg-[#1A1514] border border-[#3A302D] rounded-none md:rounded-sm transition-all duration-300 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-[#D4AF37]/10

components.button_primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#120E0D] px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-[0.1em] font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-[#F7E7CE] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.4)]
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-[0.1em] font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-[#120E0D]
components.input: bg-transparent border-b border-[#3A302D] text-[#FDFBF7] py-3 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-0 transition-colors placeholder:text-[#A6948F]
components.marquee: react-fast-marquee with Playfair Display italic, low contrast text (#2B2220), massive gaps
components.data_testid_requirement: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, filters, portfolio items) MUST have role-based data-testid attributes.

animations.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
animations.page_transitions: Framer Motion for soft fade and slide-up (duration 0.8s, ease [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1]).
animations.hover: Subtle border color shifts to gold, slight negative Y translations, delicate glow effects.
animations.parallax: Use Framer Motion or React Spring Parallax for hero image and typography layering.

pages_and_sections.name: Landing Page
pages_and_sections.description: Editorial hero section with cinematic depth. Large Playfair Display typography overlapping the high-end dark gold abstract background. Navigation in a crystal glass header.

pages_and_sections.name: Services Showcase
pages_and_sections.description: Bento grid layout with asymmetric spans. Hovering over a service (UI/UX, SEO, etc.) shifts the border to gold and reveals a luxurious glassmorphism tooltip or sub-text.

pages_and_sections.name: Portfolio Showcase
pages_and_sections.description: Elegant grid with masonry or offset alignment. Filter tags (e.g., Web Dev, Branding) are minimal uppercase text. Clicking an item opens a full-screen or large modal with Playfair titles, Work Sans descriptions, and rich imagery. Dynamically loaded via CRUD.

pages_and_sections.name: Contact Inquiry Form
pages_and_sections.description: A refined, minimalist form utilizing Shadcn logic but heavily customized to look like an editorial inquiry sheet. Only bottom borders for inputs, elegant gold submit button.

pages_and_sections.name: Secure Admin Dashboard
pages_and_sections.description: Control-room grid with a luxury twist. Deep mocha background, solid #1A1514 cards with delicate 1px #3A302D borders. Clear Work Sans typography for data. Gold accents for active states and primary actions. Includes Tabs for 'Projects', 'Inquiries', and 'Settings' (Resend API key).

media.icons: lucide-react with stroke-width 1.5, colored in #D4AF37 or #F7E7CE depending on contrast.

images.description: Intricate gold abstract sculpture on dark background for luxurious hero visual
Luxury minimalist office representing the agency's premium workspace
Detailed hand-drawn wireframe representing UI/UX Design services

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the public marketing pages (Landing, Portfolio, Services, Contact) to achieve the editorial, asymmetrical layout.
Use Shadcn UI components for the Admin Dashboard and the Contact form logic, customizing them to fit the dark mocha/gold theme.
DO NOT use Inter or standard fonts for headings; enforce 'Playfair Display' for all titles.
Enforce high-contrast accessibility: use the Champagne text (#FDFBF7) on Mocha backgrounds.
For the hero overlay, use a subtle gradient from #120E0D to transparent so the text is readable but the image breathes.
Ensure the Admin Dashboard has full CRUD capability for the Portfolio (stored in MongoDB) and allows email settings configuration (Resend API).
CRITICAL: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements, forms, tabs, and buttons.
